AppDirect named Leader in Forrester Marketplace Development Platforms report, scoring highest in 25 criteria, Q4 2024.
news.summary: In San Francisco, AppDirect, a prominent B2B commerce platform, revealed that it has achieved the status of Leader in The Forrester Wave™: Marketplace Development Platforms, Q4 2024 report. This recognition was based on scoring the highest in the current offering and strategy segments. The assessment, which examined nine leading marketplace platform providers, identified AppDirect as a Leader, with a perfect score in 25 criteria. These criteria encompassed various aspects such as customer experience front end, customer success program, search functionality, and promotion strategies.

news.headline: New report on Quantum Technology Industry projects expanding quantum market till 2024; focuses on cybersecurity, AI, sensors, and strategies.
news.summary: Dublin-based ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently included the "Quantum Technology Industry Report 2024" in their offerings. This report, now in its second year, aims to keep readers updated on the advancements in the quantum technology industry. It covers various aspects such as quantum cybersecurity, sensors, networks, and computing. The report is designed to provide comprehensive insights into the current state and future trends of the industry. For those looking to broaden their understanding of quantum technology, this annual publication is a valuable resource.

news.headline: Indian single malt Godawan launched in UK by Diageo India, most awarded single malt, highly anticipated debut.
news.summary: In London, Godawan Artisanal Indian Single Malt, which is Diageo India's most awarded Single Malt, has made its highly anticipated debut in the United Kingdom. With numerous accolades to its name, this premium spirit is now available to consumers in the UK, marking a significant milestone for the brand. The move signifies the increasing global presence of Indian spirits in the market, with Godawan poised to make a mark in the competitive industry. Cheers to this exciting development for Diageo India, as they bring their acclaimed Single Malt to a new audience in the UK.

news.headline: Spreetail reports record-breaking Black Friday and Cyber Monday with $10.8 billion spent online, 40% growth over previous year.
news.summary: Spreetail, a prominent ecommerce marketplace accelerator for oversized products, experienced its most successful Black Friday and Cyber Monday to date. The company reported a 40% increase over the previous year's "Turkey 12" (T12) in 2023. According to Adobe Analytics, online consumers set a new record by spending $10.8 billion on Black Friday 2024, reflecting a 10.2% surge from the previous year. This upward trajectory persisted through the weekend and culminated in Cyber Monday, where total consumer spending reached significant levels.

news.headline: Barbara Sinatra Children's Center partners with Marcus Theatres and William Daniels for holiday child safety campaign.
news.summary: Revered actor William Daniels has taken on a leading role in a public service announcement dedicated to raising awareness about child abuse. The campaign was launched by the Barbara Sinatra Children's Center (BSCC) in Rancho Mirage, California on December 6, 2024. This initiative aims to shed light on the issue of child abuse, particularly during times of increased risk. Through this partnership, important information about child abuse prevention is being disseminated to the public, with the goal of protecting vulnerable children.

news.headline: Abraham Bolden, ex-Secret Service agent appointed by JFK, honored with CAPA 2024 "Profile in Courage" Award.
news.summary: In Chicago on December 6, 2024, former U.S. Secret Service Agent Abraham Bolden was awarded the "Profile in Courage" Award by Citizens Against Political Assassinations (CAPA) for 2024. Bolden, who was personally selected by President John F. Kennedy, received this prestigious honor.

news.summary: The base shelf prospectus is now available for public viewing. The final prospectus supplement will be accessible online within the next two business days. Both documents can be found on SEDAR+ and on EDGAR for review.

news.headline: Middlefield Global Real Asset Fund merges with Real Estate Split Corp, exchanging each Real Asset unit into 0.36409573 units of Real Estate Split. Approximately 1,054,761 Preferred Shares and Class A Shares were issued. Real Asset units delisted on TSX. No action needed for Real Asset unitholders to receive new shares.
news.summary: Real Estate Split Corp. (TSX: RS, TSX: RS.PR.A) has successfully merged with Middlefield Global Real Asset Fund (TSX: RA.UN) on December 6, 2024. Following the merger, Real Estate Split is the continuing fund. Each Real Asset unit has been exchanged into 0.36409573 units of Real Estate Split, consisting of one Preferred Share and one Class A Share. The exchange ratio was determined based on the net asset value per unit of Real Asset on December 5, 2024, divided by the net asset value per Unit of Real Estate Split Corp. A total of approximately 1,054,761 Preferred Shares and 1,054,761 Class A shares of Real Estate Split were issued as part of the merger transaction. Real Asset units were delisted from the TSX at the close of business on December 5th. Unitholders of Real Asset are not required to take any action to receive their Preferred Shares and Class A Shares of Real Estate Split.

Rio Tinto shows commitment to gender equality by supporting organizations fighting domestic violence in Canada.
news.summary: On the National Day of Remembrance and Action on Violence Against Women, Rio Tinto in Montreal is strengthening its pledge to combat domestic violence by extending assistance to local Canadian organizations. As part of the 16 Days of Activism against Gender-Based Violence, the company will continue its partnership with groups offering shelters, counseling, education, and training for individuals impacted by domestic and family violence. This initiative marks Rio Tinto's fifth consecutive year supporting programs aimed at aiding women, children, and other affected individuals across Canada.

40Seas partnering with leaders in sourcing & logistics to simplify importing goods from China; aiding in automation, finance extension, and invoice digitization.
news.summary: 40Seas, a prominent platform, is revolutionizing trade finance and global operations as it experiences a significant increase in worldwide sales volumes. The company is empowering sourcing agencies and logistics firms by providing automation for accounts receivable, offering financial support to customers, and facilitating the digitalization of invoice management. This groundbreaking initiative is set to transform the way businesses operate in the international market landscape.

news.headline: Dr. Charles Huang from Pasaca Capital won the "Outstanding Entrepreneur" award at IABS Forum 2024 in Ontario.
news.summary: Renowned entrepreneur Dr. Charles Huang was recently awarded the "Outstanding Entrepreneur" accolade by the International Association of Biomedical Sciences (IABS) at the 2024 Forum in Ontario, California. The event took place from December 5th to 6th, 2024.

news.headline: Ping Identity recognized as a Leader in The Forrester Wave CIAM Solutions Q4 2024, securing digital identities for enterprises.
news.summary: In a report released on December 6, 2024, Ping Identity, a prominent company specializing in safeguarding digital identities for major corporations worldwide, was recognized as a Leader in The Forrester Wave™ for Customer Identity and Access Management (CIAM) Solutions in the fourth quarter of 2024. Ping's exemplary performance in the evaluation conducted by Forrester solidified its position as a front-runner in the industry.

news.headline: KIA EV9 wins "Best EV of the Year" and KIA Sorento wins "Best SUV of the Year" in Hispanic Motor Press awards.
news.summary: The Kia EV9 has been honored with the title of "Best EV of the Year," while the Sorento has been awarded as the "Best SUV of the Year." This achievement marks the third year in a row that Kia SUVs have been recognized among the top vehicles for Hispanics. The announcement was made in Irvine, California on December 6, 2024. The EV9, a three-row all-electric SUV, and the Sorento have solidified Kia's popularity in the market.

news.headline: SOUL-CIAL releases "Hang a Little Hope on the Tree" Christmas Gift Set to support abandoned pets, available Dec 1-31.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, in New York and Hong Kong, SOUL-CIAL, the popular lifestyle brand recognized for its fusion of top-notch design and meaningful intent, is launching the "Hang a Little Hope on the Tree" Christmas Gift Set for the upcoming holiday season. This special gift set will be on sale exclusively from December 1 to December 31, offering customers a unique opportunity to purchase a limited edition product that spreads joy and positivity during the festive season.

news.headline: Jimmie Lee, CEO of JLEE and Associates, discusses importance of tech stack for growth in 2025.
news.summary: The CEO of JLEE and Associates, Jimmie Lee, emphasized the importance of choosing the appropriate technology stack in 2025 as businesses face intricate challenges. This decision is no longer just tactical but strategic. The insight was shared from Bellevue, Wash., on Dec. 6, 2024.

news.headline: Bitcoin surpasses $100K amidst market volatility - Bybit and Block Scholes release November Option Volatility Report.
news.summary: In Dubai on December 6, 2024, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally based on trading volume, released the November Option Volatility Report in collaboration with Block Scholes. The report highlights a significant achievement in the crypto market, where Bitcoin (BTC) crossed the milestone of $100,000. This unveiling showcases the latest data and insights regarding options volatility within the market.

news.headline: Max Foundation expands collaboration with Novartis to provide access to Fabhalta for PNH patients across 53 countries.
news.summary: Max will promptly initiate efforts to facilitate humanitarian aid for Fabhalta® (iptacopan) in conjunction with its network of partner hematologists in 53 countries. Patients in low to middle-income nations suffering from the rare blood disorder rely on regular blood transfusions and often endure a challenging array of symptoms.

news.headline: ITRI showcases tech innovations at CES 2025 in booth 8430. It is one of the world's leading research institutions.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, in Hsinchu, the Industrial Technology Research Institute (ITRI) from Taiwan, which is a prominent high-tech applied research institution globally, is welcoming attendees to visit its booth 8430 at North Hall, LVCC during CES 2025. They can also explore the institute's innovative projects on its event website.

news.headline: Nexxen to host presentations on proposed stock exchange changes at AGM on Dec. 20, 2024. Shareholders to vote.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, Nexxen International Ltd. (AIM/NASDAQ: NEXN) revealed plans to host two presentations addressing the proposed stock exchange and trading structure modifications at its upcoming Annual General Meeting on December 20, 2024. Nexxen, a global advertising technology platform specializing in data and advanced TV, will delve into the process, timing, and strategic significance of these changes for shareholder consideration.

news.headline: VolitionRx announces pricing of $1.9 million direct offering, with potential for $2.7 million more.
news.summary: VolitionRx Limited (NYSE AMERICAN: VNRX) based in HENDERSON, Nevada, recently announced the potential for significant financial gains. They revealed the possibility of receiving up to $1.9 million initially, along with the chance of securing an added $2.7 million in aggregate gross proceeds upon the full exercise of common stock purchase warrants.

news.headline: Edgewater Wireless announces $1.1M private placement with $0.05 per unit for up to 22M units, totaling gross proceeds.
news.summary: Edgewater Wireless Systems Inc. (TSX-V: YFI) in Ottawa, Ontario, has announced a non-brokered private placement of up to 22,000,000 units at $0.05 per unit. This offering aims to raise total gross proceeds of $1,100,000. Each unit will comprise one common share and one common share purchase warrant. The warrant gives the holder the right to buy one extra common share of the company at an exercise price of $0.08.

news.headline: Element451 received $175 million investment from PSG to grow AI usage in higher ed admissions and student success.
news.summary: Element451, a prominent student engagement platform leveraging AI technology in higher education recruitment and retention, has disclosed a significant development. PSG, a prominent growth equity firm specializing in software and tech services, has made a strategic investment in Element451. This investment is intended to help the company cater to the increasing need for AI-driven student engagement solutions in higher education and similar learning environments. The move comes as educational institutions are grappling with rising demand for advanced engagement tools.

news.headline: BAE Systems secures $2.5B contracts for CV90 vehicles with Sweden and Denmark. CV9035MkIIICs to enhance armed forces.
news.summary: In a recent announcement made on December 6, 2024, BAE Systems, listed on the London Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol BA, disclosed that it has secured separate deals with Sweden and Denmark for the supply of advanced CV90 combat vehicles. The contracts, with cumulative values reaching around $2.5 billion, entail the provision of new CV9035MkIIICs. These state-of-the-art vehicles are set to significantly enhance the military capabilities of the defense forces in both countries.

news.headline: Valisure and Picket Pharmaceuticals partner to certify injectable drugs, enhancing transparency in chemical quality.
news.summary: Picket Pharmaceuticals has partnered with Valisure to enhance transparency and ensure independent validation of chemical quality within the supply chain. The collaboration, revealed on December 6, 2024, aims to address gaps in quality control processes. This strategic partnership signifies a significant step towards improving overall product quality assurance within pharmaceutical manufacturing.

news.headline: Dynagas LNG Partners LP confirms results of 2024 annual meeting in Athens, Greece on Nov. 29 with shareholders.
news.summary: A liquefied natural gas carrier owner and operator, Dynagas LNG Partners LP (NYSE: “DLNG”), held its Annual Meeting of Limited Partners on November 29, 2024, in Athens, Greece. The meeting approved multiple resolutions.

news.headline: Mint Mobile customers donated $250,000 to St. Jude Children's Research Hospital on GivingTuesday. Ryan Reynolds announced the contribution.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, Mint Mobile, a wireless company listed on NASDAQ as TMUS, made a charitable contribution on GivingTuesday. The company revealed that all earnings from new customer transactions on December 3 totaled to $250,000, which will be donated to St. Jude Children’s Research Hospital®. Actor Ryan Reynolds, who is associated with Mint Mobile, highlighted that this initiative allows new customers to support a significant cause while also benefiting from the company's savings.

news.headline: SCC named as Ortega's new agency, to build brand; Ortega has America's top taco sauce. Chicago Dec. 6, 2024 - PRNewswire
news.summary: A Chicago-based independent creative agency, Schafer Condon Carter (SCC), is increasing its involvement in the consumer packaged goods (CPG) sector by focusing on bolstering the brand value of the Ortega® brand's extensive range of Mexican food products. This renowned agency's efforts will particularly highlight America's top-selling taco sauce within the Ortega® portfolio. This development was reported on December 6, 2024.

news.headline: Earlyworks partners with Service Innovation, operator of "Yummeet!" gourmet website, with GLS tech, on Dec 6, 2024.
news.summary: In Tokyo on December 6, 2024, Earlyworks Co., Ltd. (Nasdaq: ELWS), a blockchain solution provider known for its advanced "Grid Ledger System" (GLS), announced a strategic partnership with Service Innovation, the company behind popular gourmet platform "Yummeet!" Service Innovation, based in Kawasaki-ku, Kawasaki City, Kanagawa Prefecture, is led by Representative Director Masatoshi Umemura. The agreement aims to leverage the strengths of both companies and enhance services for users. Earlyworks' cutting-edge technology and Service Innovation's expertise in the culinary sector are expected to drive innovation.

news.headline: HubSpot acquires Frame AI, boosting AI capabilities; deal aims to enhance customer experience with data insights.
news.summary: HubSpot, a prominent customer platform for business expansion based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, recently revealed an agreement to purchase Frame AI, an advanced AI-driven conversation intelligence platform. Through Frame AI's technology, unstructured data like emails, calls, meetings, and conversations are converted into immediate insights and practical suggestions. This tool empowers businesses to predict customer requirements and provide outstanding experiences. This strategic move marks an essential advancement for both companies in enhancing customer interaction.

news.headline: Golden Matrix Group (NASDAQ: GMGI) CEO updates on strategic progress and financial positioning.

news.headline: Still Austin Whiskey Co. in Austin, Texas introduces Tanager Cigar Blend Whiskey, their most premium offering made with ancient Petites Eaux blending technique.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, a distillery has unveiled its highest-quality product yet, employing the traditional Petites Eaux blending method.
